_help: Add a track: drop its .mp3 in assets/music/, add an entry under "tracks" keyed by the exact .mp3 filename, then set "featured" to the track the landing page should show. make_video.sh credits whichever track it randomly used; index.html embeds the featured one. Optional per-track "start_at" (seconds) makes the Short's audio begin at that point in the song.
